narrative:
Precinct Maumee 2 (precinct in Lucas County) has 1,203 registered voters, with 53.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 22.3% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 24.6%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.3 percentage points.
